sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value String, number Float64, date_value Date);
SELECT id, reinterpretAsFloat64(toUInt64(value)) AS reinterpret_value FROM test_table WHERE reinterpret_value NOT IN (SELECT number FROM test_table WHERE date_value < '2023-01-02');
SELECT id, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY reinterpretAsFloat64(toFloat64(number))) AS count_group FROM test_table HAVING count_group NOT IN (1, 2, reinterpretAsFloat64(NULL));
SELECT id, reinterpretAsFloat64(CAST(value AS UInt8)) AS float_value FROM test_table WHERE float_value NOT IN (0, 1) AND date_value = reinterpretAsFloat64(0x0);
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value NOT IN (SELECT CAST(value AS String) FROM test_table WHERE date_value = reinterpretAsFloat64(number));
SELECT MAX(reinterpretAsFloat64(number)), MIN(reinterpretAsFloat64(NULL)) AS min_value FROM test_table GROUP BY reinterpretAsFloat64(date_value);
SELECT id, reinterpretAsFloat64((number * 100) - (SELECT MAX(number) FROM test_table)) AS processed_value FROM test_table WHERE processed_value NOT IN (1, 2, 3);
